info.title: Fantasy Economy RPG API
info.description: REST API under /api/v1. Shared Zod schemas are the contract.

get.summary: API and database health
Liveness — process is up (no database dependency)
Readiness — database reachable and migrations applied

post.summary: Register a new account (active immediately)
Log in with email and password
Log out and invalidate the current session

get.summary: Inspect the current session

post.summary: Change password and rotate the session token
Revoke every session except the current one

get.summary: Read account settings
The bundled visual asset manifest (roles, defaults, checksums)
List playable classes

post.summary: Create the account character (one per account)

get.summary: Current character summary
Derived attributes and resources
Stored notifications (the source of truth) + unread count

post.summary: Mark one notification read
Mark every notification read

get.summary: All quests with this character state and progress

post.summary: Accept a quest (progress starts only from acceptance)
Claim rewards for a completed quest (exactly once)
Start traveling to a directly connected destination

get.summary: Current travel status (lazily finalizes expired travel)
The character's current location
Local features available at the current location
Directly connected destinations from the current location
The whole world topology and the caller’s current location
Inventory: slot usage, stacks, and unique items
Public item definition

post.summary: Equip an owned, unlocked item instance
Unequip a slot back into inventory (requires a free slot)

get.summary: Current Gold balance (decimal string)
Recent immutable ledger entries

post.summary: Rest at the local inn: full HP/MP for a level-scaled fee

get.summary: The character ability roster, loadout, and talents

put.summary: Set the equipped ability loadout (bounded, unlocked only)
Choose (or clear) the talent for an unlocked tier

post.summary: Respec at a trainer: reset loadout and talents for a Gold fee

get.summary: NPC shops at the current location
Shop stock (approximate availability; restocks lazily)
Per-unit sellback price preview for an item at this shop

post.summary: Buy from a stock entry (atomic, race-safe, idempotent)
Sell stackable items to the shop at its sellback rate (idempotent)
Open your shop, registered to a region

get.summary: Your shop

patch.summary: Update your shop name or description

get.summary: Regions a shop may register to

post.summary: List an asset for whole-listing sale (marketplace location only)

get.summary: Browse listings (any safe location)

delete.summary: Cancel your active listing (asset returns to inventory)

post.summary: Buy a whole listing (marketplace location only)

get.summary: Market summary for an item (median needs 5+ recent sales)
Your deliveries (lazily finalizes arrivals)
Gathering actions at the current location + skill progress

post.summary: Start a timed run (reward pre-rolled server-side, never exposed)

get.summary: Gathering state after lazy finalization

post.summary: Place a capacity-held reward into inventory (exactly once)

get.summary: Recipes at the current location + profession progress

post.summary: Start a timed run (inputs + Gold consumed atomically, once)

get.summary: Crafting state after lazy finalization

post.summary: Collect a capacity-held output (exactly once)

get.summary: Encounters at the current location + any active combat

post.summary: Start a persisted server-authoritative combat

get.summary: Full combat state (refresh-safe)

post.summary: Resolve one command (locked, versioned, idempotent-safe)

get.summary: Museum collections with this character donation progress

post.summary: Donate an eligible artifact (atomic, first copy only, irreversible)

get.summary: The current cycle's bounty board and regional reputation

post.summary: Claim a bounty (turn-in; once per character and cycle)
Salvage an equipment instance into crafting materials

get.summary: The authoritative world clock: current cycle and time segment
The current regional atmosphere for the character's location
NPCs present at the current location during the current world segment
A named NPC, with its availability for the requesting character

post.summary: Start a conversation with a present NPC

get.summary: The current state of an NPC interaction the caller owns

post.summary: Make a dialogue choice (expected-version + idempotency-key guarded)
End an NPC interaction

get.summary: Active world events in the character's current region
A bounded, privacy-safe recent-activity feed for the current location
The coherent current-scene read model (one request, whole scene)
Channels this character may currently access, with unread counts
Cursor-paginated channel history (opaque, stable cursors)

post.summary: Send one plain-text message (idempotent per author + key)
Advance read state to a real message (never backward)

get.summary: Characters this character has blocked

put.summary: Block a character (unilateral, idempotent, invisible to them)

post.summary: Report a message (one per reporter and message, snapshotted)

get.summary: Admin role and current recent-auth validity

post.summary: Verify the current password and stamp recent-auth on this session

get.summary: Bounded character search (cursor paginated)
Character overview (high-sensitivity)
Character inventory (high-sensitivity)
Character ledger (paginated, date-bounded, high-sensitivity)
Character item transfers (paginated, date-bounded)
Character marketplace activity (paginated, date-bounded)
Character quests, collections, and skills

post.summary: Signed Gold adjustment through the ledger (audited, idempotent)
Grant items (capacity-aware, audited, idempotent)
Remove a free item (rejects every locked state; no force path)

patch.summary: Edit safe item-definition fields with optimistic concurrency
Edit safe shop configuration with optimistic concurrency

post.summary: Schedule an immediate restock through the normal locked service

get.summary: Database-derived economy metrics for a bounded UTC window
Reported messages with evidence (reporter identity never shown)

post.summary: Resolve or dismiss a report (evidence preserved)
Redact a message to a tombstone (never hard-delete)
Apply a chat-send restriction (enforced immediately)
Revoke a chat restriction (history preserved)

get.summary: List content releases (newest first)

post.summary: Create a draft release from live content or a prior release

get.summary: Release detail with its definition catalog
Validate a release (errors, warnings, dependency edges)
Diff a release against the current published baseline
Fetch a single definition payload for editing

put.summary: Create or replace a definition in a draft (domain-validated)

delete.summary: Remove a definition from a draft

get.summary: Definitions that reference this one (where used)
Preview a definition with its references resolved in the draft

post.summary: Atomically publish a draft to the live tables (audited)
Retire a published release (definitions preserved)
Roll a prior release forward as a new published release
